full_text:
Wang Jun (Shizhi) 王濬 (士治)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Jun (王濬), styledShizhi (士治), was born in Hu county in Hongnong. Commander of the force that conqured Wu. Wang Jun was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Wang Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
